description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a landscaped yard, featuring a main building with a gable roof and a detached garage or outbuilding. The property is surrounded by a paved driveway and walkways, with manicured lawns, trees, and flowering shrubs adding to its suburban charm. The main entrance is accentuated by a small porch, and the house has multiple windows arranged symmetrically on the front and sides. The backyard includes a fenced area, possibly for recreation or gardening, and there is a visible patio or pool area. The roof is dark and steeply pitched, while the exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between the main house, garage, and landscaped features.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, detached garage, and landscaped yard featuring trees, shrubs, and a paved driveway. The house has a small front porch, symmetrical windows, and a fenced backyard area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway, and landscaped yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, backyard, and the arrangement of trees and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio or pool area, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the fenced backyard, side windows, and additional landscaping.
